events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday today, known for hits like 'Jenny from the Block' and her extensive acting career.

angles.name: J-Lo's Influence
angles.copy: From the Bronx to global icon, Jennifer Lopez turns 57 today. Which J-Lo track is an absolute must-play for you?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever broadcast.

angles.name: MTV's Legacy
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released in 1994, featuring anthems like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and kicked off a new era. What's your standout track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair began on this day in 1969, bringing together half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since Woodstock brought a generation together. If you could have been there, which legendary act would you have queued for?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years on, the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, is still deeply missed. What's the one Elvis song that always gets you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The influential lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude with The Pretenders shaped a generation. What's your favourite track from her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and a Britpop icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54! Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Oasis anthem he sang?

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: The original Apple iPod, which revolutionised how we listen to music, was released in 2001. It marks 25 years since its release year.

angles.name: Tech Revolution
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? The original Apple iPod first arrived in 2001, changing music consumption forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From Connery to Craig, who is your definitive 007 and what's the best Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire. Which of his songs means the most to you?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his genius is undeniable. What's your favourite Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', was released in 1968, featuring a diverse collection of tracks.

angles.name: White Album Legacy
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles delivered the iconic 'White Album'. A sprawling masterpiece with so many unforgettable tracks. Which one is your go-to?
